<!-- Generated by GitHub Copilot on 2026-03-15 -->
# Technical Specification: Technologies Section — Modern Landing Page Redesign

## 1. Overview

Adds a technology badge rail to `LandingPage.razor` that groups technologies into named capability bands. On pointer devices, individual badges have a subtle hover effect. Content is driven by a new `wwwroot/data/technologies.json` file.

**Key business value:** A visible technology stack acts as a passive trust signal for technical evaluators without requiring them to read dense copy.

**Scope and constraints:**
- Technologies sourced from a new `technologies.json` to isolate the data model
- No external icon/logo assets; text-only badges
- Hover effects scoped to pointer devices via `@media (hover: hover)`

---

## 2. Data / Content Layer

### 2.1 New File: `wwwroot/data/technologies.json`

```json
{
  "bands": [
    {
      "label": "AI & Machine Learning",
      "technologies": [
        "Azure OpenAI", "Semantic Kernel", "GitHub Copilot",
        "LangChain", "Generative AI"
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Cloud & Infrastructure",
      "technologies": [
        "Azure", "Azure Container Apps", "Azure Functions",
        "GitHub Actions", ".NET Aspire"
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Backend",
      "technologies": [
        "C# / .NET", "ASP.NET Core", "Entity Framework Core",
        "MCP (Model Context Protocol)", "REST APIs"
      ]
    },
    {
      "label": "Frontend",
      "technologies": [
        "Blazor", "HTML / CSS", "JavaScript", "Tailwind CSS"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

> **Note:** The technology list is illustrative. Content team should review and align with actual practice capabilities before shipping.

### 2.2 Blazor Models

Add to `Services/LandingModels.cs` (alongside existing models):

```csharp
public record TechnologyBand(string Label, string[] Technologies);
public record TechnologiesData(TechnologyBand[] Bands);
```

### 2.3 Data Loading

Add to `LandingPage.razor` data load (alongside existing parallel fetches):

```csharp
TechnologiesData? technologiesData;

// Inside OnInitializedAsync, add to Task.WhenAll pattern:
var t3 = Http.GetFromJsonAsync<TechnologiesData>("/data/technologies.json");
await Task.WhenAll(t1, t2, t3);
technologiesData = t3.Result;
```

---

## 3. UI Component

### 3.1 File Changes

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `wwwroot/data/technologies.json` | Create new file |
| `Components/Pages/LandingPage.razor` | Add technologies section markup; extend data loading to include `technologies.json` |
| `Components/Pages/LandingPage.razor.css` | Add badge, band, and rail styles |

### 3.2 Markup Structure

```razor
<section id="technologies" class="technologies-section" aria-labelledby="technologies-heading">
    <div class="section-inner">
        <h2 id="technologies-heading" class="section-title reveal-item" style="--reveal-delay: 0ms">
            Technologies
        </h2>

        @if (technologiesData?.Bands is { Length: > 0 })
        {
            <div class="tech-bands">
                @foreach (var (band, bandIndex) in technologiesData.Bands.Select((b, i) => (b, i)))
                {
                    <div class="tech-band reveal-item" style="--reveal-delay: @(bandIndex * 100 + 80)ms">
                        <h3 class="tech-band-label">@band.Label</h3>
                        <ul class="tech-badge-list" role="list">
                            @foreach (var tech in band.Technologies)
                            {
                                <li class="tech-badge">@tech</li>
                            }
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</section>
```

### 3.3 CSS — Technologies Section (`LandingPage.razor.css`)

```css
.technologies-section {
    padding: 5rem 2rem;
    background: var(--color-surface-card);
}

.tech-bands {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: 2.5rem 3rem;
}

.tech-band-label {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    color: var(--color-text-muted);
    margin: 0 0 1rem;
}

.tech-badge-list {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
}

.tech-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 0.35rem 0.875rem;
    background: var(--color-surface-base);
    color: var(--color-text-secondary);
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    border-radius: var(--radius-pill);
    border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    transition:
        background-color var(--motion-fast),
        border-color var(--motion-fast),
        color var(--motion-fast);
    white-space: nowrap;
}

@media (hover: hover) {
    .tech-badge:hover {
        background-color: var(--color-surface-overlay);
        border-color: var(--color-accent-border);
        color: var(--color-accent-solid);
    }
}

/* Tablet and mobile: single column */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
    .tech-bands {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: 2rem;
    }

    .tech-badge {
        white-space: normal;   /* allow wrapping on very narrow badges */
    }
}
```

---

## 4. Testing Requirements

### Data Loading Tests (Unit — xUnit)

| Test | Setup | Action | Expected |
|------|-------|--------|----------|
| JSON deserialises to model | `technologies.json` fixture | `JsonSerializer.Deserialize<TechnologiesData>` | `Bands.Length >= 3`; each band has `Label` and `Technologies` |
| Empty bands array handled | JSON with `"bands": []` | Render component | Section renders with heading but no bands (no exception) |

### UI Tests (Playwright)

| Test | Action | Expected |
|------|--------|----------|
| Section renders | Navigate to `/` | `<section id="technologies">` present |
| At least 3 bands | Inspect DOM | At least 3 `.tech-band` elements |
| Band labels present | Inspect `.tech-band-label` | Each has non-empty text |
| Badges within each band | Inspect `.tech-badge-list` | Each band contains at least 1 `.tech-badge` |
| Hover on desktop | Hover `.tech-badge:first-child` at 1280px viewport | Badge border-color changes to accent |
| Touch device default state | Emulate mobile device | No `.tech-badge` has hover-state border visible |
| No overflow 375px | Viewport 375px | No horizontal scrollbar; bands stack vertically |
| Badges not interactive | Inspect DOM | No `<a>` or `<button>` wrapping badges |
| Badge text contrast | Accessibility audit | Text on `var(--color-surface-base)` meets WCAG AA |

---

## 5. Implementation Notes

### Architectural Decisions

- **New `technologies.json` rather than extending `services.json`:** Technologies are a distinct data domain. Adding them to `services.json` would conflate two unrelated concerns and complicate the `ServicesData` model.
- **Text-only badges with no external icon library:** Avoids adding a runtime CSS/JS dependency. Technology logos could be added later by switching to an SVG sprite pattern; the badge markup requires only wrapping the text in a `<span>` and adding an SVG sibling.
- **`role="list"` on `<ul>` elements:** Safari removes list semantics from `list-style: none` lists. Explicit role restores screen reader announcement of count.
- **`white-space: nowrap` on desktop:** Prevents badge text from wrapping mid-word (e.g. "Azure Container Apps" should not break), giving the rail a cleaner appearance. Overridden on mobile to prevent truncation.

### Dependencies & Build Order

1. Create `wwwroot/data/technologies.json`
2. Add `TechnologyBand` and `TechnologiesData` records to `LandingModels.cs`
3. Extend `OnInitializedAsync` in `LandingPage.razor` to fetch the new file (add to `Task.WhenAll`)
4. Add technologies section markup to `LandingPage.razor` — after How We Work, before Contact CTA
5. Add technologies CSS to `LandingPage.razor.css`

### Edge Cases & Error Handling

- If `technologies.json` fails to load: `technologiesData` is null; the `@if` guard prevents rendering the inner markup; section heading still renders
- If a band has an empty `Technologies` array: `ul` renders with zero items; no visual artefacts
- Technology names longer than ~25 characters with no spaces: `white-space: nowrap` may create very wide badges on mobile; the mobile override `white-space: normal` mitigates this

### Performance Considerations

- Fetch `technologies.json` in the same `Task.WhenAll` as other data requests — single round-trip penalty per page load
- Badge hover transitions use `--motion-fast` (150ms) to feel instant without being snappy

---

## Prerequisites

- [Hero Section Spec](./hero-section-spec.md) — design tokens (`--color-surface-base`, `--color-accent-border`, `--radius-pill`, `--motion-fast`, `--color-text-muted`) and `.reveal-item` system required
- [How We Work Section Spec](./how-we-work-section-spec.md) — `id="how-we-work"` anchor must exist; Technologies follows How We Work in DOM order
